en: Finish the English phrase Better late than never
ko: 영어 표현을 완성해봐. Better late than never. 늦더라도 안 하는 것보다 낫다.

ko: Carter 선생님, better late than never. If you can't beat them,

en: join them This means if you can't defeat your opponent you should be on their side
ko: join them. 이길 수 없으면 합류하라는 뜻이야.

en: Look if you can't beat them join them A leopard can't change its spots We
ko: 이봐, 이길 수 없으면 합류해. A leopard can't change its spots.

ko: 누군가의 습관이나 성격이 바뀌지 않을 때 이 말을 해. 표범은 점을 바꿀 수 없지.

en: but hey good luck Don't count your chickens before they hatch
ko: 행운을 빌어. Don't count your chickens before they hatch.

en: This means you shouldn't count on something if it hasn't happened yet Don't count your
ko: 아직 일어나지 않은 일을 기대하지 말라는 뜻이야. 부화하기 전에
